data.title: Atento Drives the Creation of New Roles in Generative AI to Transform the CX Sector
data.description: Atento, a global company, is ramping up industry innovation by recruiting experts in conversational AI, such as quick-response engineers and conversational designers. This move underlines its dedication to human-centric technology. The company, headquartered in Miramar, Florida, announced this initiative on March 19, 2026. Atento aims to enhance its workforce with specialists in this field to drive progress.

data.title: Duke Energy invests $500,000 to strengthen storm preparedness across North Carolina
data.description: Aid totaling $500,000 is being provided by the Duke Energy Foundation to assist communities in enhancing their readiness for severe weather, natural calamities, and emergency response obstacles. Nonprofit groups and government agencies at the local level are invited to submit their applications by April 30. Located in Charlotte, N.C., this initiative has been announced today, March 19, 2026.

data.title: Birmingham City Council Approves Landmark Properties' First Birmingham PBSA Development
data.description: A recent ruling has granted approval for the construction of 504 student beds at 120 Suffolk Street in Birmingham City Centre. Landmark Properties, a leading developer of student accommodations in the United States, has received the go-ahead for this substantial redevelopment project. The development is set to offer much-needed housing options for students in the area. This decision marks a significant step forward in addressing the demand for student housing in Birmingham.

data.title: Avg. 61% drop in hacked crypto tokens, with low chance of recovery, says Immunefi report. Attacks cause prolonged downtime and liquidity shocks. DeFi systems magnify impact across markets.
data.description: In addition to immediate financial losses, attacks frequently result in extended periods of downtime, sudden liquidity shocks, and a decline in confidence. This is particularly impactful because decentralized finance (DeFi) networks are interconnected, causing the effects to ripple throughout the market and exacerbate the situation. This interconnectedness heightens the repercussions, creating a broader impact beyond the specific figures involved in the initial attack.

data.title: UNI's price may reach $4.16 by March end, currently at $3.52 with RSI at 40.08. Bulls aim for $3.66 resistance retest.
data.description: The trading price of UNI is currently at $3.52, showing bearish momentum as the Relative Strength Index (RSI) is at 40.08. Analysis indicates a potential retest of the upper Bollinger Band at $4.16 if bulls are able to surpass the resistance level of $3.66.

data.title: Rocket Alumni Solutions, Boston-Based Start-Up, Joins The New England Council
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in Boston, Rocket Alumni Solutions, a prominent provider of touchscreen software, was announced as a recent addition to the New England Council. The Council functions as a non-partisan organization that facilitates the connection between businesses and policymakers. This move aims to strengthen collaboration and communication between the business sector and policymakers in the region.
